title: Personal Portfolio Website Layout
description: Initialize a local Git repository, commit your portfolio index.html layout, and push it to GitHub. Make sure it's public and visible.

title: GitHub Branching & Merging Conflict Resolving
description: Create a feature-branch, introduce a change in main, and merge the branch to resolve a conflict manually in VS Code.

title: Day 3 - Git CLI Basics & First Commits
description: Submit a GitHub repository you created today. Ensure it contains your local changes initialized, staged, and committed using the Git CLI.
